name: MGS Delta: Snake Eater (Eclipse perf)
aliases: Metal Gear Solid Delta Snake Eater
post_apply_message:
Eclipse perf mod applied (or will be, once staged). Recommended Steam Deck settings: 1280x800, TSR enabled (NOT TAAU — unstable) at medium/high/ultra to taste. Shadows high or ultra (no perf cost). GI medium-high (Lumen unused here, only affects ambient).

Eclipse's tested Deck hardware setup: GE-Proton (10-15 or newer), TDP 18, GPU clock 1800, CPU/GPU undervolt -50 in BIOS, SDWEAK enabled. IMPORTANT: this mod targets a SPECIFIC game build (1.2.4 / build 21521628). If Steam updates the game past that, the modded exe may crash — Revert this recipe (restores the original exe from .gfm-orig) and wait for an updated mod. The mod is NOT in git (it contains a modified copyrighted game exe); stage it into your local-payloads folder first — see notes.
notes: Eclipse Steam Deck graphics-optimisation mod. Mod files are NOT committed (modified copyrighted game exe + large paks) — they live in your local-payloads folder off git. To stage: extract the Eclipse .rar, then copy the CONTENTS of its inner 'Metal Gear Solid Delta Snake Eater' folder into <local-payloads>/eclipse-mgs-delta/payload/mod/ so you end up with payload/mod/MGSDelta/Binaries/Win64/MGSDelta-Win64-Shipping.exe. Then Apply copies that over the game dir, backing up replaced files. Source: Eclipse on Nexus (metalgearsoliddeltasnakeeater/mods/181).
